name: Tee it Up! Golf Lounge
about: Tee it Up! Golf Lounge is an indoor golf destination in Texarkana, AR, featuring two state-of-the-art simulation bays and a dedicated putting green. The venue also offers a portable third simulator for off-site events. Beyond the golf experience, it provides a comfortable lounge area for relaxing, club repair and evaluation services, and a consignment program for used equipment. The facility is accessible via walk-ins and offers various membership options for frequent players.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 300 world-class and fantasy golf courses
Advanced launch monitor technology providing detailed swing data
Portable simulator option for bringing the game to off-site events
Comprehensive club fitting and repair services available on-site
Relaxed lounge atmosphere for practicing or socializing between rounds

food_and_drink.notes: Not explicitly mentioned on the website, but BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is not stated.
Not explicitly mentioned on the website, but BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is not stated.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue encourages you to use your existing clubs, as they offer club evaluation and adjustment services to fine-tune your equipment for your swing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state a policy on bringing outside food and drinks. It focuses on its lounge atmosphere for relaxation between swings.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time for playing 18 holes, as it can vary greatly depending on simulator software, number of players, and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as having a laid-back lounge atmosphere for all skill levels, making it suitable for families and juniors.
